concerns.text: Task T015 specifies loading 'Qwen/Qwen2-VL-7B-Instruct', but spec FR-002 and Constitution Principle VII mandate 'mmpro/MMProLong-7B-1.0'. This is a silent relaxation of the specific model artifact requirement, violating the 'Verified Accuracy' and 'Modality-Balance Rigor' constraints.

Task T010 implements a 'Dual-Arm' generator (Arm A: Constant Text, Arm B: Constant Total). Spec FR-001 and US-1 strictly require holding 'text-only token count constant' while varying images. Arm B (reducing text to keep total constant) violates the explicit independent variable definition in the spec, effectively weakening the experimental design constraint.

Task T020 only implements 'logic to filter results' for short-context samples. Spec FR-006 and US-4 require the system to 'include and evaluate a subset of short-context visual grounding questions'. The task misses the generation/creation step for this specific control group, failing to satisfy the full acceptance criterion of FR-006.

Task T019 enforces a fixed 'average time per sample ≤ 21.6s' (derived from 10k samples). Spec SC-003 and Plan.md state the total time must be ≤ 6 hours for '[deferred]' N samples. Hardcoding the per-sample time for a specific N (10k) in the task weakens the constraint to a fixed N, ignoring the spec's requirement to handle a variable dataset size determined in the research phase.
